* **IMMZD18SPneumococcal3DosesLogic**

## Library: IMMZD18SPneumococcal3DosesLogic 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD18SPneumococcal3DosesLogic | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-04-03 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD18SPneumococcal3DosesLogic |

 
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Pneumococcal.3 doses schedule table in the Immunization CPG
